import uuid
import logging

def process_job(job_data):
    # Correct: generate a correlation ID once and pass it along (or use contextvars)
    correlation_id = uuid.uuid4()
    logging.info(f"[{correlation_id}] Starting job processing")
    do_work(job_data, correlation_id)
    logging.info(f"[{correlation_id}] Job finished successfully")
